title: Kitchen Perfected® 2 Slice Extra Wide Slot Toaster - 750W - 7 Browning Levels - High Lift Eject Function - Centralisation for even cooking - Removable Crumb Tray - E2020BK - Gloss Black
features: 2 SLICE EXTRA WIDE SLOT TOASTER: Prepare delicious breakfasts every day with 2 extra wide toasting slots ideal for a whole host of family favourites including thick slices of bread, crumpets, teacakes and even bagels.

7 STAGE VARIABLE BROWNING SETTINGS: Select the perfect setting for your taste; whether you like your bread lightly toasted or well done, there are 7 settings to make sure everyone's toast is perfect for them. The browning settings are controlled with an easy to use numbered dial; the higher the number the longer the bread is toasted.

MID-CYCLE CANCEL BUTTON AND HIGH LIFT EJECT FUNCTION: Pressing the mid-cycle cancel button will cause both toasting slots to pop-up mid way through a toasting cycle, preventing further browning. The extra high lift allows for easy bread removal and is perfect for getting crumpets out without the risk of burning your fingers.

750W COMPACT DESIGN: The simple and sleek design will look great on your kitchen worktop and measuring just 18 x 14 x 25cm it won't take up too much room. It's small enough to be stored away in a cupboard or displayed on the kitchen worktop alongside a coordinating Kitchen Perfected Kettle. It has low energy consumption using just 750w and is made from strong, durable plastic with cool-touch sides. The power cord is suitable for use with any British standard mains supply.
SLIDE OUT CRUMB TRAY FOR EASY CRUMB REMOVAL: The toaster has a handy, concealed crumb tray which helps avoid mess on the worktop and makes cleaning the toaster quick and easy.
description: Prepare a Whole Host of Family Favourites The Kitchen Perfected® 2 slice extra wide slot toaster prepares a whole host of family favourites including thick slices of bread, crumpets, teacakes and even bagels. Choose from 7 browning settings to find your perfect browning level or pop-up mid-cycle with the cancel button and high lift eject function. The handy removable crumb tray helps avoid mess on the kitchen worktop and makes cleaning the toaster quick and easy. Made from strong, durable plastic the unit has cool-touch sides and a low energy consumption of 750w. The power cord is suitable for use with any British standard mains supply. The no-fuss, simple design looks great on any kitchen worktop and measuring just 18 x 14 x 25cm it won't take up too much room either. Team up with a Kitchen Perfected® cordless kettle for colour coordinating style. Box Includes: 1 x toaster and instruction booklet.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Bread Size: 125 x 100mm, Cancel Function, Self Centering Rack, Slot Width: 30mm, Variable Browning Control
